name: ntfy
description: Simple HTTP-based pub-sub notification service. Send push notifications to your phone or desktop via scripts.
summary: ntfy has seen rapid development in early 2026, with v2.21.0 (released 2026-03-30) being the latest release. Major recent additions include PostgreSQL support as an alternative database backend (v2.18.0), PostgreSQL read replica support (v2.19.0), S3-compatible object storage for attachments (v2.20.0), and a verified email recipients feature (v2.21.0) introduced after ntfy.sh's AWS SES account was suspended due to unsolicited email abuse. See full release notes at https://github.com/binwiederhier/ntfy/releases.

answers.What is the current license?: Apache 2.0 (server) and GPL-2.0 (client) — dual licensed; check repository for exact terms
answers.Is the project actively maintained?: Yes — multiple releases in March 2026 alone
answers.Does it support authentication and acces: Yes — user management, access control, and auth queries supported including read-replica routing for auth checks
answers.Is there a hosted cloud version availabl: Yes — ntfy.sh is the official hosted instance

breaking_excerpts: v2.20.0: ntfy will take full control over the attachment directory or S3 bucket, deleting files matching message ID format (^[A-Za-z0-9]{12}$) with no database entries — do not reuse attachment-cache-dir for other purposes.
v2.21.0: smtp-sender-verify flag introduced; ntfy.sh now requires email address verification before sending email notifications due to AWS SES suspension.
v2.18.0: Experimental PostgreSQL backend introduced as alternative to SQLite — requires migration using the provided one-off migration tool.

alternatives.name: Pushover
alternatives.review: Paid SaaS, simple API, iOS/Android apps.

alternatives.name: Gotify
alternatives.review: Self-hosted only, real-time push via WebSocket.

alternatives.name: Apprise
alternatives.review: Apprise is a powerful multi-service notification library supporting dozens of backends, but it is a library/CLI tool rather than a persistent pub-sub server with subscriber management.

alternatives.name: Pushbullet
alternatives.review: Pushbullet provides cross-device push notifications with file and link sharing, but its free tier is rate-limited and it is a closed-source cloud-only service unlike ntfy's self-hosted model.

alternatives.name: Ntopng Alerts / Alertmanager (Prometheus)
alternatives.review: Alertmanager is a robust alerting solution tightly integrated with the Prometheus ecosystem, but it is designed for infrastructure monitoring alerts rather than general-purpose scriptable push notifications.
